text.title: UI Component Library Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Internal SaaS UI library v1
example.note: layers=[tokens, primitives, patterns, templates]; Storybook with addon-a11y + addon-interactions; states required default/hover/focus/disabled/loading/empty/error; a11y=axe-core block_merge; visual_regression=chromatic block_merge; release_process=changesets+semver+CHANGELOG.md; deprecation_window_minors=2. 12 consuming apps upgrade with one-line patch; Chromatic diff caught accidental token regression at PR; axe-core caught contrast on warning button.

example.title: Flat-folder + manual a11y rebuild
example.note: Library was flat `src/components/*`; no Storybook; a11y manual; ad-hoc tagging. Breaking change shipped as v1.2.1 patch; 5 apps broke. Tree caught: four-layer-architecture + a11y-axe-in-ci + semver-and-changelog. Rebuild took 3 weeks but restored consumer confidence.
